68fd4026a03782f1b6578ff8.question: A king of this region gave parental leave to the enslaved nobi, and collaborated with the Hall of Worthies to create a simple alphabet. In this region, Baekje was defeated by the kingdom of Silla, which unified this region before being subsumed by (*) Goryeo. Spiky turtle ships were used by this region's sailors under the command of Yi Sun-shun. Sejong the Great ruled this peninsula, which became divided by the 38th parallel in the 20th century. For 10 points, the northern half of what peninsula is ruled by the Kim dynasty from Pyongyang?
68fd4026a03782f1b6578ff8.question_sanitized: A king of this region gave parental leave to the enslaved nobi, and collaborated with the Hall of Worthies to create a simple alphabet. In this region, Baekje was defeated by the kingdom of Silla, which unified this region before being subsumed by (*) Goryeo. Spiky turtle ships were used by this region's sailors under the command of Yi Sun-shun. Sejong the Great ruled this peninsula, which became divided by the 38th parallel in the 20th century. For 10 points, the northern half of what peninsula is ruled by the Kim dynasty from Pyongyang?
68fd4026a03782f1b6578ff8.answer: Korea [Korean Peninsula; or Hanguk; or Joseon; or North Korea; or South Korea; or Democratic People's Republic of Korea; or Republic of Korea]
68fd4026a03782f1b6578ff8.answer_sanitized: Korea [Korean Peninsula; or Hanguk; or Joseon; or North Korea; or South Korea; or Democratic People's Republic of Korea; or Republic of Korea]

68fd4026a03782f1b6579007.leadin: One of these places in Altamira (AHL-tah-MEE-rah) was closed to the public after the breath of visitors caused mold to form on artworks. For 10 points each:
68fd4026a03782f1b6579007.leadin_sanitized: One of these places in Altamira (AHL-tah-MEE-rah) was closed to the public after the breath of visitors caused mold to form on artworks. For 10 points each:
parts: Name these natural formations that house many paintings by prehistoric humans.

In 2019, cave paintings showing half-man and half-human figures were discovered on this Indonesian island. A 45,500-year-old drawing of a pig found on this island to the east of Borneo may be the oldest-ever art.
The Chamber of Felines and Hall of the Bulls can be found in this French cave system famed for its prehistoric art.
parts_sanitized: Name these natural formations that house many paintings by prehistoric humans.

In 2019, cave paintings showing half-man and half-human figures were discovered on this Indonesian island. A 45,500-year-old drawing of a pig found on this island to the east of Borneo may be the oldest-ever art.
The Chamber of Felines and Hall of the Bulls can be found in this French cave system famed for its prehistoric art.

68fd4027a03782f1b6579024.question: The merchant Tamrin advises a queen about the virtues of this man in the Kebra Nagast, a text that relates how this man becomes the father of the Ethiopian monarch Menelik. This man legendarily owned a ring, a staff, or a talisman that allowed him to control the (*) djinn (jin), as related in the 38th Surah. A Book of Wisdom compiled in ancient Alexandria was legendarily ascribed to this man. For 10 points, name this ruler of Israel who built the First Temple and who was the son and the successor of king David.
68fd4027a03782f1b6579024.question_sanitized: The merchant Tamrin advises a queen about the virtues of this man in the Kebra Nagast, a text that relates how this man becomes the father of the Ethiopian monarch Menelik. This man legendarily owned a ring, a staff, or a talisman that allowed him to control the (*) djinn (jin), as related in the 38th Surah. A Book of Wisdom compiled in ancient Alexandria was legendarily ascribed to this man. For 10 points, name this ruler of Israel who built the First Temple and who was the son and the successor of king David.

68fd4028a03782f1b65790c5.leadin: Arthur C. Clarke's novel Fountains in Paradise won both this prize and the Hugo Award in 1980. For 10 points each:
68fd4028a03782f1b65790c5.leadin_sanitized: Arthur C. Clarke's novel Fountains in Paradise won both this prize and the Hugo Award in 1980. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this prestigious award given to science fiction and fantasy novels published in the United States.
This author of the Earthsea series and “The Ones Who Walk Away from Omelas” has received the most Nebula Awards of any author, with four wins out of six nominations.

The first Nebula Award was awarded to this Frank Herbert novel in 1966. In this novel, Paul Atredies disrupts the production of “spice” on the desert planet of Arrakis, which is inhabited by sandworms.
parts_sanitized: Name this prestigious award given to science fiction and fantasy novels published in the United States.
This author of the Earthsea series and "The Ones Who Walk Away from Omelas" has received the most Nebula Awards of any author, with four wins out of six nominations.

The first Nebula Award was awarded to this Frank Herbert novel in 1966. In this novel, Paul Atredies disrupts the production of "spice" on the desert planet of Arrakis, which is inhabited by sandworms.
answers_sanitized: Ursula K. Le Guin [Ursula Kroeber Le Guin]

68fd402aa03782f1b65791b9.leadin: For 10 points each, answer the following about Mexico's many varieties of mole (MOH-lay), a traditional chili sauce.
68fd402aa03782f1b65791b9.leadin_sanitized: For 10 points each, answer the following about Mexico's many varieties of mole (MOH-lay), a traditional chili sauce.
parts: Perhaps the best-known variant, which uses sugar and cocoa, comes from this state. The defeat of a French army in a battle named for this state is commemorated on Cinco de Mayo.
This nearby state, nicknamed the “land of the seven moles,” names a valley that houses Monte Albán, the Zapotec capital.
Chimole, a variant nicknamed “Black Dinner,” is commonly eaten on this peninsula, which separates the Gulf of Mexico from the Caribbean Sea and is home to Cancun.
